title: lycium depressum subsp. depressum
intro: Lycium depressum subsp. depressum, also known as a type of boxthorn, is a type of flowering plant in the nightshade family that is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Lycium depressum subsp. depressum include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. The plant's medicinal properties can be utilized through herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made by drying the leaves and stems of the plant.
